case_title: ALLIED PROPERTY & CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. ARRON IVAN GALINIS ET AL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLIED PROPERTY & CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALINIS, ARRON IVAN $2,250.52 PRINCIPAL, $179.31 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,654.83, SEE SCANNED DOC
